member.name: T:StakingInfo
member.summary: Staking metadata for an account or a contract returned in CryptoGetInfo or ContractGetInfo queries
member.param: the amount in Hbar that will be received in the next reward situation
the total of balance of all accounts staked to this account or contract
the account to which this account or contract is staking
the ID of the node this account or contract is staked to

member.name: M:StakingInfo.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Convert a byte array to a staking info object.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: P:StakingInfo.DeclineStakingReward
member.summary: If true, the contract declines receiving a staking reward. The default value is false.

member.name: P:StakingInfo.StakePeriodStart
member.summary: The staking period during which either the staking settings for this account or contract changed (such as starting staking or changing staked_node_id) or the most recent reward was earned, whichever is later. If this account or contract is not currently staked to a node, then this field is not set.

member.name: P:StakingInfo.PendingReward
member.summary: The amount in Hbar that will be received in the next reward situation.

member.name: P:StakingInfo.StakedToMe
member.summary: The total of balance of all accounts staked to this account or contract.

member.name: P:StakingInfo.StakedAccountId
member.summary: The account to which this account or contract is staking.

member.name: P:StakingInfo.StakedNodeId
member.summary: The ID of the node this account or contract is staked to.

member.name: M:StakingInfo.ToBytes
member.summary: Convert the staking info object to a byte array.
